_comment: Mutation testing for the MONEY/FX CORRECTNESS core — the derivations where a silent wrong answer matters most, and where a real bug class was found and fixed. Mutation testing runs the covering tests once per injected fault, so it is deliberately scoped to these pure libs (not the whole SPA); the vitest config is scoped to match. Run: `pnpm run mutation`. Heavy — a scheduled/opt-in CI job, not the fast lane.
